title: Cobblemon Arcadia
description: The official Modpack for Cobblemon Arcadia. No port-forwarding required.
body:
# Welcome to
![Cobblemon Arcadia Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/113d8241c1cff502e36a8e39e9515327ee079202_0.webp)

Cobblemon Arcadia is a Minecraft server focused around community, competitive growth, and even more to come!

## Hey I got some questions for you...

### Why CA?
While it isn't much right now, we're trying our absolute hardest to provide the most creative Cobblemon experience we can. With custom music, designs, ideas, and Pokemon, the intent is to create a wholly-fleshed-out and fresh take on Cobblemon.

### What does CA do differently than other Cobblemon Servers?
The main idea behind the server is to create a gameplay loop that doesn't spend all of your time just waiting around. We want you to have the most fun playing on the server, and as cobblemon is right now, the mod cant be doing all the heavy lifting in that department.

### What are your plans for the future of CA?
A story mode to compete with mainline pokemon, permanent uptime on minigames with a queue system, a competitive mode with showdown commands, a progression leveling system which provides rewards based off of performance in minigames and the story mode, and events such as the Arcadian Lopunny event (TBA).

## Features

- Hi-Fi forms bring life back to previously less competitively viable Pokemon
- A Unique Hub realm
- Multiple Ports/Realms to explore (Currently only one, but they're planned!)
- Resource Realm (Planned)
- More to come!
